# @babel/types > Babel Types is a Lodash-esque utility library for AST nodes See our website [@babel/types](https://babeljs.io/docs/babel-types) for more information or the [issues](https://github.com/babel/babel/issues?utf8=%E2%9C%93&q=is%3Aissue+label%3A%22pkg%3A%20types%22+is%3Aopen) associated with this package. ## Install Using npm: ```sh npm install --save-dev @babel/types ``` or using yarn: ```sh yarn add @babel/types --dev ```
